comments.LineComment: | Datum references and material condition modifiers for GD&T.
| Datum labels (A-Z) per ASME Y14.5. Letters I, O, Q are excluded
| - **MMC**: Maximum Material Condition (largest shaft, smallest hole)
| - **LMC**: Least Material Condition (smallest shaft, largest hole)
| - **RFS**: Regardless of Feature Size (default, no symbol)

value.value: Maximum Material Condition - largest shaft, smallest hole
Least Material Condition - smallest shaft, largest hole
Regardless of Feature Size - tolerance applies at any size
